allies.rationale_text: Metacognitive-questioning is a direct ally of cognitive-gaps-assessment because it makes hidden uncertainty and capability gaps explicit.
allies.source_quote: metacognition applied strategically to identify intellectual limitations

allies.rationale_text: Feynman-technique strengthens cognitive-gaps-assessment by exposing where understanding collapses under plain-language explanation.
allies.source_quote: the true test of your understanding

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias blocks cognitive-gaps-assessment when already-favored capability stories receive more weight than reality deserves.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Cognitive-gaps-assessment conflicts with confirmation-bias when assessments overweight already-favored capability narratives.
structured_tensions.source_quote: cognitive-gaps-assessment vs confirmation-bias: assessments overweight already-favored capability narratives.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Cognitive-gaps-assessment conflicts with authority-bias when rank substitutes for objective competency evidence.
structured_tensions.source_quote: cognitive-gaps-assessment vs authority-bias: rank substitutes for objective competency evidence.

curation_notes.summary: Relation surface stays inside the current graph vocabulary and keeps omission stronger than weak forcing.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 3 target ids or import donor-shaped relation neighborhoods to rescue weak local grounding.
open_questions: Some source-real neighbors remain omitted because the current graph vocabulary would force weaker mappings than this conservative pass allows.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only and is noted only in batch artifacts.
antagonists: No multihop or higher-order semantics were introduced in these Wave 3 files.
structured_tensions: Explicit tensions were preserved only where the raw source clearly earned a current-vocabulary target.
